8th Wall supports the use of custom domains for both self-hosted projects and 8th Wall-hosted projects. If you are self-hosting, you will need to whitelist your domain/sub-domain. If you are using 8th Wall hosting and want to use your own domain/sub-domain you will have to configure your DNS server to point the domain/sub-domain at 8th Wall's infrastructure.
Setup your domain to point to this 8th Wall-hosted project
Setup this project for self-hosting or local development
An {{account_type}} account is required to connect a domain
An {{account_type}} account is required for self-hosted domains.
You must first create a project with 8th Wall Cloud Editor before connecting your domain.
project_dashboard_page.domain_setup.addi: Note: If you connect additional sub-domains, these will redirect to the primary connected domain. They must share the same root as the primary connected domain.
project_dashboard_page.domain_setup.blur: In order to point your domain(s) at your 8th Wall-hosted project you must verify that you are the owner of the domain(s) that you have listed. In order to verify that you are the owner of the custom domain, you must login to your DNS registrar's website and add the verification record(s) with the details below to your domain(s). These changes can take up to 24 hours to propagate so you may have to wait 24 hours before refreshing verification status.

In order to connect your domain with this project, you must login to your DNS registrar's website and add the record(s) with the details below to your domain(s). Once you have added the records on your DNS registrar’s website please wait a few minutes for the changes to propagate before pressing “Refresh deployment status” to verify the changes.

Connecting a domain (or subdomain) allows users to access your 8th Wall hosted project via a domain that you own. This requires updates to the DNS settings of your domain. In order to successfully connect a domain you must complete all of these steps within 72 hours. Please make sure you have appropriate access to your DNS registrar website and/or DNS server settings. Also, please ensure that the domain (or subdomain) you wish to connect is not currently in-use and pointed to another host/site before proceeding.

<0>Note:</0> It is recommended that you connect a <2>subdomain </2> (e.g. webar.mydomain.com) instead of the root domain (e.g. mydomain.com). Not all DNS providers support CNAME records for the root domain (also known as ANAME or ALIAS records). If you are unsure, please contact your DNS provider to see if they support ANAME / CNAME / ALIAS records for the root domain before proceeding.

Enter the domains where you will be self-hosting your project. A domain may not contain a wildcard, path, or port. Whitelisting your domains below allows your 8th Wall app key to be used at the domains you list here. This prevents unauthorized usage of your app.
<0>Note:</0> Self-hosted domains are subdomain specific. For example, if you will be hosting at “mydomain.com” and “www.mydomain.com” you must specify both.

project_settings_page.edit_pwa_settings_: Progressive Web Apps (PWAs) use modern web capabilities to offer users an experience that's similar to a native application. Learn more about PWAs and their limitations in our <1>documentation</1>.
